top3.sql:
WITH sales_by_state_year AS (
    SELECT 
        s_state,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d_date) AS year,
        SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2000-01-27' AND '2000-04-26'
    GROUP BY s_state, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d_date)
),
year_over_year AS (
    SELECT 
        current_year.s_state,
        current_year.year AS cu...
